title: Selected Work
subtitle: AI product design, complex B2B workflows, and design leadership — selected for Jupus

application.positioning: Design Function Builder · AI-Native Leader · Regulated Domain Translator

selection_rationale.ninox-ai-onboarding: Primary AI story: conversational prompt-to-output UX, model uncertainty handling, user agency. Directly maps to Jupus chatbot and AI phone product.
selection_rationale.churchdesk-booking-system: Primary workflow story: opaque regulated domain simplified to clean UX, measurable outcomes (70%/90%), multi-stakeholder coordination. Bridges to legal workflow complexity.
selection_rationale.bibeltv-color-api: Design system from scratch: cross-platform, token-first, built without prior infrastructure. Shows ability to set technical foundations as first design hire.
selection_rationale.ninox-org-building: Leadership story: org building, team design, hiring, culture. Shows the 'first design hire' pattern Jupus needs.
selection_rationale.datameer-data-dense-analytics: Regulated industry depth: banks and insurers, data-dense interfaces, design elevated to strategic partner.
selection_rationale.bibeltv-support-agent: Second AI story: human-in-the-loop, AI tools for professional users, trust and control design.
